reviews.comment:
Lugar está bueno para tomar un cafecito de pasada o hacer un descanso antes de volver a nuestra cuidad lo que sie estaría buenos haya más opciones como tostados o  tortas justo cuando fuimos solo había empaquetados nada elaborado propio

(Translated by Google)
The place is good to have a coffee in passing or take a break before returning to our city, which would be good if there were more options such as toast or cakes. Just when we went there was only anything packaged that was made by ourselves
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1eDhPc1VBEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The employee who cleans the bathrooms fills the bucket with the hot water from the Taragui supplier, where one grabs water for the mate! a disgust.
